debug_info.goal:

pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
⊢ ‖GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc‖ *
      nth_partial 2 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu pbar ε poly pc) pbar.innerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc)))
      (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

failed_attempts:
have hS : ‖pc.S‖ ≠ 0 := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, rotproj_inner_unit]
  rw [fderiv_const_div (by fun_prop) hS]
  rw [HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv]
  simp only [rotproj_inner', ContinuousLinearMap.coe_coe, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply,
    smul_eq_mul]
  have : (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 3)) =
      EuclideanSpace.basisFun (Fin 3) ℝ 2 := rfl
  rw [this, Basis.constr_basis]
  simp
  field_simp
